verdicts.reason: Valid MoS2 monolayer, 10 A vacuum added to c, cell printed correctly.
H2O with EMT, BFGS, energy before and after printed correctly.
Bulk modulus mislabeled GPa but is eV/A^3 (unconverted); v0**(1/3) lattice const wrong for fcc.
Runs but prints frequencies as complex +0.j and includes spurious near-zero modes.
POSCAR write/read, 1-atom primitive fcc, cell lengths printed correctly.
Al bcc cubic a=3.3, cell and Al2 formula correct.
Fe bcc(110) 4 layers, 2x2 in-plane = 16 atoms, cell printed.
Cu(211) 3-layer surface, vacuum 10, atom count and cell printed.
Used empty g2.db instead of molecule('CH4'); printed 'not found', no data.
CO2 manual build, get_distances returns [1.16,1.16,2.32] correctly.
OH on Pt(111) at three sites, EMT single-points, lowest site identified.
Au fcc to XYZ, read back symbols and positions correctly.
Built CsCl-type 2-atom cell, not rocksalt NaCl; spacegroup R3m wrong (should Fm-3m).
a0=v0**(1/3) wrong for fcc primitive (~2.26 not 3.6); slab built with wrong lattice constant.
